overview: Modern, dark-themed website showcasing various interactive and visually rich UI/UX components with vibrant animations and effects, emphasizing cutting-edge front-end development.

layout.structure: Centered main heading and call-to-action text. The main content area dynamically displays full-screen interactive components. A split view is simulated with a code editor section overlaid on the top portion of the screen.
layout.max_width: 100vw for component demos, text content is fluidly centered.
layout.spacing: Generous vertical spacing for text elements, interactive components fill the available viewport space.

animations.type: Tubes trail with gradient color shift
Liquid distortion with rainbow gradient shift
Glowing particle field, interactive color change

interactions.effect: Generates a glowing, multi-colored tube trail
Applies a liquid distortion and gradient color shift
Changes the primary glow color of the background orb
Expands menu items radially with icon animations
Triggers a background fill animation and icon change (e.g., from cart to checkmark)

background_effects: Solid dark background (#1a1a1a) to highlight interactive components. The components themselves often feature complex shader-based or particle effects as their backgrounds.
special_elements: Animated 'Add to cart' button with internal sliding background
recreation_notes: The primary challenge lies in accurately recreating the complex, GPU-intensive interactive animations and effects (liquid distortion, particle systems, interactive cursor trails). These likely involve WebGL, canvas, or advanced SVG/CSS properties, often combined with JavaScript for interactivity. Performance optimization for smooth animations across different devices is crucial. Each component acts as a distinct module, with the site serving as a gallery.
